## Summary

Emit **Soroban contract events** on every `set_score` attestation so indexers, the dapp, and partner protocols can subscribe to score changes without polling `get_score` for every wallet.

---

## Problem

`set_score` writes silently to persistent storage. External systems discover changes only by:
- Polling RPC (expensive at scale)
- Watching oracle wallet txs (fragile)
- Calling ZCore API (centralized)

On-chain events enable decentralized notification.

---

## Proposed implementation

**File:** `Contracts/score-registry/src/lib.rs`

```rust
#[contracttype]
#[derive(Clone, Debug, Eq, PartialEq)]
pub struct ScoreUpdated {
    pub wallet: Address,
    pub score: u32,
    pub tier: u32,
    pub previous_score: u32,
    pub previous_tier: u32,
    pub updated_at: u64,
}

// Inside set_score, after storage write:
env.events().publish(
    ("score_updated",),
    ScoreUpdated {
        wallet: wallet.clone(),
        score,
        tier,
        previous_score: old.score,
        previous_tier: old.tier,
        updated_at: env.ledger().timestamp(),
    },
);
```

Optional future: `("score_revoked",)` if admin revoke added (#27).

---

## Event schema (document in Contracts/README.md)

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| wallet | Address | Subject wallet |
| score | u32 | New score 0–850 |
| tier | u32 | New tier code 0–3 |
| previous_score | u32 | Prior score (0 if none) |
| previous_tier | u32 | Prior tier |
| updated_at | u64 | Ledger timestamp |

Topic: `("score_updated",)`

---

## Consumer integration

### Stellar RPC

After deployment, document how to fetch events:
- Filter by contract ID + topic
- Use `@stellar/stellar-sdk` `rpc.Server.getEvents` (verify API for current SDK version)

### ZCore dapp

**File:** `Front/app/dashboard/attestation/page.tsx`
- After attest, show event in activity feed (optional)
- Link Stellar Expert tx + contract events tab

### Partner lenders

Example use case: Blend bot reprices borrower when tier drops.

---

## Tests

- [ ] `set_score` emits exactly one event
- [ ] Event payload matches storage
- [ ] First attestation: `previous_score = 0`

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Events emitted on every successful `set_score`
- [ ] Schema documented with example RPC query
- [ ] Unit test asserts event publication
- [ ] Deployed testnet contract verified on Stellar Expert
- [ ] Note in #17/#18 docs for indexer-based auto-reporting pattern
